checks.description: Provider license and commercial use terms must be reviewed.
checks.notes: No provider is approved for real alpha validation.

checks.description: Provider reliability and failure behavior must be probed.
checks.notes: Prior provider probes were limited and not approval.

checks.description: Provider fields must map to the daily OHLCV contract.
checks.notes: Mapping coverage has not been proven on real data.

checks.description: Raw/qfq/hfq adjustment policy must be defined.
checks.notes: Adjustment handling can change factor conclusions.

checks.description: A-share symbol format must be normalized.
checks.notes: Provider symbol conventions may differ.

checks.description: Duplicate symbol/date rows must be detected.
checks.notes: Duplicates can corrupt factor panels.

checks.description: Missing bar behavior must be detected and documented.
checks.notes: Missing data policy is not ready.

checks.description: Suspension handling must be represented.
checks.notes: Suspensions affect tradability and returns.

checks.description: Corporate action handling must be defined.
checks.notes: Corporate actions affect historical prices and returns.

checks.description: Minimum symbol coverage must be defined and satisfied.
checks.notes: Tiny samples cannot support alpha claims.

checks.description: Minimum date coverage must be defined and satisfied.
checks.notes: Short histories cannot support robust validation.

checks.description: Train/validation/test split policy must exist.
checks.notes: No split policy is approved.

checks.description: Out-of-sample validation must be required.
checks.notes: OOS evidence is mandatory later.

checks.description: Walk-forward validation must be required.
checks.notes: Walk-forward evidence is mandatory later.

checks.description: Transaction cost model must be defined.
checks.notes: Costs can erase apparent factor performance.

checks.description: A-share market rules must be integrated into validation.
checks.notes: T+1, lots, limits, suspensions, ST and fees matter.

checks.description: Liquidity and capacity policy must exist.
checks.notes: Small-capital and capacity constraints are core requirements.

checks.description: Raw data storage policy must be defined.
checks.notes: Raw data must not leak into git.

checks.description: Raw data must not be committed.
checks.notes: Use local_artifacts or later approved data lake.

checks.description: Dataset reproducibility manifest must be required.
checks.notes: Validation must be reproducible.

checks.description: Provider failures must be logged and handled.
checks.notes: Failures must not be silently ignored.

checks.description: Paper feedback is required before any live path.
checks.notes: No live readiness exists.

checks.description: No alpha claim is allowed without full evidence gates.
checks.notes: No alpha evidence exists yet.
